ROSCO 2026

DOSSIER // 01

WHAT IS ROSCO?

// ABOUT ROSCO

ROSCO is an annual robotics competition organized by the General Sir John Kotelawala Defence University Student Chapter of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers (IMechE) in collaboration with the Electronic, Robotics and Innovation Club (ERIC) of KDU.

ROSCO'26 marks the first edition to be conducted as an inter-university competition and the first to be organized in collaboration with the IMechE Sri Lanka Group.

The competition provides undergraduate students from universities across Sri Lanka with a platform to design, build, and demonstrate innovative robotic solutions while fostering innovation, teamwork, and practical problem-solving skills.

ORGANIZED & SUPPORTED BY

REGISTRATION OPENING
PHASE 02 // DATE: 22 JULY 2026
Workshop 01
Problem Identification & Robot Design Strategy — a live Zoom webinar on 22nd July 2026 covering how to break down the challenge, define constraints and scope the design problem, then translate that into chassis architecture, mechanical layout and competition design trade-offs.
VIEW WORKSHOP 1
PHASE 03 // DATE: TBA
Workshop 02
Advanced technical workshop covering specialized topics. Details will be released after Workshop 01.
PHASE 04 // DATE: 15 AUG 2026
Robotics Showdown Grand Finale
The main event. Competing units battle for the ROSCO 2026 championship title on 15th August 2026. Venue to be announced.

TRAINING MODULES // 05

WORKSHOPS

Topics Covered

MOD.01

PROBLEM IDENTIFICATION

Breaking down the challenge, defining constraints, and scoping the design problem.

MOD.02

ROBOT DESIGN STRATEGY

Chassis architecture, mechanical layout, and design trade-offs for competition.

MOD.03

SENSOR INTEGRATION

Sensor selection, signal conditioning, and fusing feedback into the control loop.

MOD.04

ALGORITHMS

Navigation logic, decision pipelines, and real-time autonomous control routines.

Workshop 1 // Live Webinar

From Rules to Robot: Engineering Design Strategies for ROSCO’26

DATE: Wednesday, 22nd July 2026
TIME: 6.00 PM onwards
PLATFORM: Zoom

Join us for an exclusive webinar designed to help you understand the engineering principles, design strategies, and practical insights needed to excel at ROSCO’26.

Session
From Rules to Robot: Engineering Design Strategies for ROSCO’26
Conducted by
Mr. Rajitha Herath B.Eng Mechatronics Engineering (Shandong University of Science and Technology) M.Phil Mechatronics Engineering (Shandong University of Science and Technology)
Join the Webinar
